name: R Squared Transport Inc

notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). Provides special-needs/wheelchair-accessible transportation per benefitscheckup.org listing. No FMCSA record found for IL entity - consistent with intrastate-only paratransit/school operation.

name: Aunt-Med Invalid Coach
registry_source: NJ Treasury Division of Revenue (not directly retrievable in-session); NJ DOH EMS registry referenced
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate medical transport). SAFER searches for 'AUNT MED INVALID COACH', 'AUNT MED', and 'AUNT' returned no records. Name appears in callersmart phone-book reference for Orange NJ (973 area code). Similar-sounding 'Alana Med Invalid Coach' (different entity, Jersey City/Hackensack NJ, est. 1999) exists but is not a name variant - likely distinct. New Jersey 'Invalid Coach' is a regulated MAV (Mobility/Medical Assistance Vehicle) category under NJ DOH EMS regulations; carriers typically intrastate-only and not FMCSA-registered. No incorporation/officer data retrievable. Input record had no address/hq, limiting confirmation.
